title: stelis variola
intro: Stelis variola, also known as the Orchid Tree, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stelis variola include its ability to aid in the treatment of wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can be used to make herbal teas, salves, and ointments for topical application.
